case_title: PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY VS. DELUXE SIGHTSEEING LLC et al

docket_entries.description: STATEMENT OF DAMAGES FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-04-2014 CONTINUED TO AUG-06-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION RE: INABILITY OF PLAINTIFF TO FILE ACTION IN SMALL CLAIM COURT; PURSUANT TO CCP 1033 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, COURT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT DELUXE SIGHTSEEING LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED FEB-20-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DELUXE SIGHTSEEING LLC
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 HOURS
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-06-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT DELUXE SIGHTSEEING LLC DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-04-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-07-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-12-2014
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $300.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT DELUXE SIGHTSEEING LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DELUXE SIGHTSEEING LLC $2,277.55 PRINCIPAL, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,577.55, SEE SCANNED DOC
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 15138111) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT DELUXE SIGHTSEEING LLC

DECLARATION OF KIMBERLY WRIGHT-VIOLICH PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 585 (D) DECLARATION OF FACTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 585(D) AND EVIDENCE CODE SECTION 1550 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY
